data.title: Todd Andre named President, Air Force & Navy Programs at M1 Support Services in Denton, TX. Leading executive for aligning M1 programs with business strategy.
data.description: In Denton, Texas, M1 Support Services revealed that Todd Andre has been appointed as the President overseeing Air Force and Navy Programs. In this newly assigned position, Mr. Andre will be responsible for offering executive guidance, strategic supervision, and operational management for all M1 Air Force and Navy initiatives. His main goals include ensuring top-notch performance, ongoing enhancements, and synchronization with M1’s enduring business plan. Todd's appointment comes after showcasing remarkable leadership and senior executive skills at M1, effectively advancing their competitive edge.

data.title: Cision acquires Trajaan, enhancing AI capabilities after partnership; strengthens consumer insights.
data.description: Cision, a prominent global provider of consumer and media intelligence, revealed its acquisition of Brandwatch and Trajaan in December 2025. This move extends the collaboration initiated by Brandwatch and Trajaan in August 2025, consolidating consumer, search, and generative AI insights within a unified ecosystem. The acquisition signifies a significant step in creating a comprehensive platform for insights, further enhancing the capabilities in this sector.

data.title: 24Petwatch Microchip Registry will move to PetPlace.com in 2026, offering unified pet services and care resources.
data.description: In a strategic collaboration, PetPlace has revealed that the 24Petwatch Microchip Registry will transition to PetPlace.com in 2026. This initiative aims to consolidate reliable microchip protection and lost pet services with specialized pet care resources on a single platform. The development, unveiled in New York on December 11, 2025, signals a significant advancement in pet wellness and security.

data.title: StoneTree Investment Partners invest in Reel Power International, a lower middle market industrial business, in Dec. 2025.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, StoneTree Investment Partners, a private equity firm specializing in lower middle market industrial companies, disclosed its latest investment in Reel Power International. The Company, based in [location], is a key player in [industry].

data.title: B&O Railroad Museum to unveil American Freedom Train No. 1 in 2026 for America 250 celebration, restoring iconic locomotive.
data.description: In Baltimore, the B&O Railroad Museum will reveal the restored American Freedom Train No. 1 (AFT No. 1) on January 12, 2026, in honor of America 250. This locomotive, a symbol of unity and patriotism during the 1975/76 U.S. Bicentennial, has been meticulously restored by the Museum as a national gift for the upcoming 250th anniversary celebration. Alongside the unveiling of AFT No. 1, a new exhibit highlighting the historic significance of the train will also be showcased.

data.title: Believe in Baseball Foundation to host "In the Spirit of the Game" awards dinner and auction in Los Angeles on Dec 11, 2025.
data.description: Los Angeles, December 11, 2025 - The inaugural "In the Spirit of the Game" event has been announced by The Perfect Game Believe in Baseball Foundation in collaboration with Chairman Rick Thurman and CEO Rob Ponger. This event aims to blend baseball and humor in an evening celebration.

data.title: Ampelis introduces CORE7, a whole-food supplement and lifestyle platform for preventive nutrition.
data.description: In a recent announcement from Highland, Utah on December 11, 2025, Ampelis introduced CORE7, a comprehensive nutritional supplement and behavior-change platform. The newly launched CORE7 aims to provide evidence-based nutrition and lifestyle assistance to the public. This initiative combines a variety of whole-food elements and a broad-spectrum approach to support overall well-being.

data.title: Billtrust extends streak as G2 AR software leader for 19 quarters, secures 35 badges in Winter 2026 report.
data.description: Billtrust, a company based in Hamilton Township, New Jersey, announced that it has achieved a notable achievement in G2's Winter 2026 Report by securing 35 badges for its AI-powered solutions. The company specializes in B2B accounts receivable (AR) workflow and payment software. The achievement marks a significant milestone for Billtrust, showcasing its continued dominance in the industry. The company's consistent performance has solidified its position as a leading provider in this sector, as evidenced by the recent recognition from G2.

data.title: Jet’s Pizza surpasses 10M AI orders, totaling $250M in sales. Growth seen in SMS ordering and phone bot programs.
data.description: Jet’s Pizza, a popular pizza shop recognized for its Detroit-Style Pizza, has achieved a significant milestone by surpassing 10 million AI orders. This translates to over $250 million in AI sales. The SMS ordering program, OrderAI by HungerRush, in addition to phone bot programs from Converse Now and HungerRush, have seen consistent growth as customers increasingly prefer quick and convenient methods to place orders at Jet’s. The brand has always emphasized embracing digital ordering innovations to enhance customer experience and meet evolving preferences.

data.title: Five Star Painting advises on holiday home revamp in Waco. Leading painting franchise offers tips for interior projects.
data.description: Leading painting professionals in Waco, Texas have shared the top interior projects for a seasonal makeover. Five Star Painting®, a prominent residential and commercial painting franchise in North America, is advising property owners to consider these ideas.
EUROPEAN UNION GIVES INITIAL NOD TO ASSET FREEZE DEAL TO HELP UKRAINE LOAN

data.title: AiMOGA Robots debut at 2025 Asian Youth Para Games Opening Ceremony in Dubai, as Chinese robots Mornine and Argos take the stage.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on December 11, 2025, the 5th Asian Youth Para Games commenced with a notable introduction of AiMOGA Robotics' cutting-edge robots. Mornine, the humanoid robot, and Argos, the quadruped robot, captivated the audience with their debut. These robots, representing Chery as official spokespersons and Technology Performers, showcased their abilities as hosts during the event.

data.title: T. Rowe Price launches Active Core ETFs mixing active and passive investing, fees waived until 2027.
data.description: The T. Rowe Price Active Core U.S. Equity ETF and the Active Core International Equity ETF leverage the blend of low tracking error found in index portfolios with the renowned active fundamental and quantitative investment research conducted by the company. This announcement was made in Baltimore on December 11, 2025. T. Rowe Price, an international firm, is at the forefront of this initiative.

data.title: VideaHealth chosen by Mosaic Dental Collective to enhance patient care in 50+ locations with AI tech.
data.description: In Boston, VideaHealth, a top dental AI company, revealed that Mosaic Dental Collective, LLC, a dentist-run dental services group, with over 50 practices in California, Washington, and Idaho, has chosen VideaAI as their comprehensive dental AI solution. This choice came after a productive trial across multiple sites that showed significant enhancements in diagnostic precision, confidence in treatment planning, and patient comprehension of recommended procedures.

data.title: Coinbase discontinuing free USDC rewards, now exclusive to paid members for Coinbase One subscription.
data.description: Coinbase is introducing a new feature where users can earn rewards on their USDC holdings. However, this will only be available to Coinbase One members. This means that not all Coinbase users will be able to take advantage of this feature. Members of Coinbase One will have the opportunity to earn rewards on their USDC holdings, offering an exclusive benefit to a select group of users.

data.title: Hanwha Finance strengthens South Korea-UAE financial ties at ADFW 2025, driving discussions on finance. Integrates traditional-digital finance strategy for global expansion.
data.description: At the largest financial event in the Middle East, significant discussions were held regarding the future of finance. A strategy aiming to integrate traditional and digital finance was presented with the goal of speeding up South Korea's global financial expansion. This event took place in Abu Dhabi, UAE on December 11, 2025. Hanwha Life was involved in these discussions.

data.title: Dow Jones up after jobless claims; Oracle stock plunges on earnings. For live coverage, follow Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase following unexpected weekly jobless claims data. Meanwhile, AI company Oracle saw a decline in its stock value due to earnings results. The Dow Jones index rose as a result of the surprise jobless claims data, while Oracle's stock plunged after the earnings report.

data.title: Nobel closes first tranche of private placement offerings in Canada.
data.description: This news release is specifically for distribution within Canada and is not permitted for distribution to United States newswire services or for dissemination in the United States.

data.title: National DCP celebrates delivery of 750th store package for Dunkin', supporting 10,000 US restaurants. $3B supply chain company.
data.description: A $3 billion supply chain management firm, National DCP, LLC (NDCP), recently marked a significant milestone by providing support to 10,000 quick-service restaurants across the United States. Headquartered in Atlanta, the company specializes in serving Dunkin' franchisees. NDCP recently celebrated a noteworthy achievement with the successful delivery of supplies to their 750th restaurant.

data.title: DMI Solutions acquires proprietary technology from Leading Edge Innovations, expanding innovation capabilities. Wharton, N.J., Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: DMI Solutions, based in Wharton, New Jersey, revealed on December 11, 2025, that they have successfully acquired the exclusive process and ingredient technology of Leading Edge Innovations. This strategic move aims to enhance DMI's innovation capacities significantly. The acquisition encompasses crucial assets such as intellectual property, specialized equipment, and more.
